title: Angel Island Welcomes the Crew
description: The Straw Hats enter Skypiea through Heaven’s Gate and meet the strange rules and tolls of the sky world.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Nami, Luffy, Usopp, Conis, Pagaya. The Straw Hats enter Skypiea through Heaven’s Gate and meet the strange rules and tolls of the sky world.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Did you lose one or two crew?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: other routes are not like this...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Wait!! We don't even know your name...

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: No way!!! So beautiful...!! it's a Pegasus!?

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: I wish you luck, brave ones!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: It turned into a strange animal!

summary: The Straw Hats enter Skypiea through Heaven’s Gate and meet the strange rules and tolls of the sky world.
